title: rubus × tunelensis
intro: Rubus × tunelensis, also known as the hybrid raspberry, is a cross between the black raspberry (Rubus occidentalis) and the purple raspberry (Rubus idaeus). This plant is rich in antioxidants, anthocyanins, and ellagic acid, which provide it with medicinal properties. The health benefits of Rubus × tunelensis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and have anti-cancer properties. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as used in jams, jellies, and other food products.
